kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.selenium.dev/selenium/web/web-form.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'testiuser' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Secret
kw.doc: Types the given secret from ``variable_name`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'Hello, Robot Framework! How are you today?' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector [name="my-select"] at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) 2 by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element [name="my-select"].
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Type Text
kw.msg: Types the text 'San Francisco' in the given field.
kw.doc: Types the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element '[name="my-check-1"]'.
